creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Port www/otrs is missing direcory $PREFIX/otrs/doc, accees rights 775, owner otrs:www.

Missing directory doc results in messages like "incomplete installation of package XXX" in the superadmins webinterface after installing, for instance, OTRS::ITMS from downloaded packages, where the doc specific file couldn't be installed.

The problem disappears when creating manually the reported doc directory with the appropriate access rights and ownership.
